mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over 3-year rolling windows or positive returns occur in less than 50 percent of rate-cut periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 6.0 percent, labor market deterioration signals weakening consumer demand and corporate earnings pressure, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in more than 55 percent of instances where UNRATE crosses above 6.0.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates synchronized domestic demand growth, which translates to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to produce positive 60-day returns in more than 60 percent of observed quarters.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects strengthening supply-side capacity utilization and corporate output, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO momentum yields negative 5-day returns in more than 50 percent of cases during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price index levels above 230.0 trigger expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL above 230.0 coincides with positive 20-day returns in more than 55 percent of monthly observations.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a declining unemployment rate confirms robust labor market tightening, which supports corporate revenue growth and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The PAYEMS-UNRATE divergence signal yields negative 60-day returns in more than 60 percent of triggered months.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product directly correlates with aggregate corporate profit expansion, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive GDPC1 growth is followed by negative 5-day returns in more than 50 percent of quarterly observations.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below the 95.0 index threshold signals severe manufacturing contraction and supply chain bottlenecks, which depresses equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO below 95.0 is followed by positive 20-day returns in more than 55 percent of monthly observations.
